Attack

6.8
2022MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

With the Parliament under siege, India’s first super soldier Arjun Shergill is tasked to get hold of the terrorists in time, save the Prime Minister from their clutches and stop a dirty bomb from exploding and destroying Delhi.

Tags

artificial intelligence (a.i.)post-traumatic stress disorder (ptsd)delhi, indiaprime ministerhostage-takingparliamentmemory losssuper soldiercyberpunksoldierterrorist attackgenetic engineeringindian armydeath of girlfriend2010s
